_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v20 TAA build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05162026/v20_plan.txt §2.3. v20 carries v19 TAA floors verbatim because v20_taa.txt is byte-identical to v19_taa.txt (which is itself byte-identical to v16.txt). The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v20 stage 3 (TAA) is byte-identical to v19; TAA Classic was not in the regressed-axis set (v19 TAA Classic 47.5 vs v18.2's 47.7; within instrument noise). Row-count gate is therefore unchanged.

axes._note: Carried from v16 verbatim. v16 manifest §3 lifts AB.TAA.{1,2,3,5} Count: 1500-2000 -> 3000 each and JS.TAA.{1,2,3} Count: 400 -> 2500 each. Per-actor cap 40 + per-primary grouping reduce post-balance actuals; floor sized to ~50% of declared. max_allowed protects against accidental Count: re-balloon.

Carried from v16 verbatim. v16 manifest §3 lifts AB.TAA.IE.{1,2} Count: 1500 -> 2500 each, AB.TAA.NEG.1 Count: 1500 -> 2500, JS.TAA.IE.1 Count: 1000 -> 2000, JS.TAA.NEG.1 Count: 500 -> 2000. Floor sized to ~70% of manifest target.
